bodyTail:
ent sample-pass attempts are still far below target. New results include 19909568 = 45.18007, 19909589 = 27.343155, 19909602 = 15.580771, 19909619 = 1.512933, 19909643 = 16.495852, 19909655 = TLE, and a parallel 19909668 = 67.748452. Current real best remains about 81.938904, target is 91.80+.

Continue in Extra High mode and abandon all simple sample-pass decimators. We need an actual legal breakthrough, not another low-score fallback: infer hidden case families from repository history, exploit vertex-only Hausdorff and fixed six-axis SSIM evaluator, build strong recognizers and case-specific remesh/output strategies, and implement a complete self-contained C++17 submission.

Primary output must be an ACTUAL downloadable file named submission_next.cpp. Also include complete standalone C++17 code block fallback. Must compile with g++ -O2 -std=c++17 -pipe and official sample first line exactly 8 12. Do not answer early; if you only have a low-score/plateau idea, keep working silently.
